metadata.description: Gold context for retrieval quality evaluation — measures whether Cortex returns the right entities for a given query
metadata.notes: Path patterns use regex. Run with --discover to see actual results and refine gold sets. Gold context calibrated against Cortex's own indexed codebase.

queries.query: chunk window overlap ingest split large function
queries.description: Should surface chunk handling in ingest and graph loading

queries.query: parse JavaScript TypeScript AST extract functions classes
queries.description: Should surface the JS/TS parser modules

queries.query: resolve import path relative file extension
queries.description: Should surface the import resolution logic in ingest

queries.query: MCP server tools register context search get_related
queries.description: Should surface the MCP server setup and tool registration

queries.query: graph relations CALLS IMPORTS PART_OF edges load
queries.description: Should surface relation and graph handling
Should surface the CLI entry point and init logic

queries.query: vector embedding cosine similarity model transformer
queries.description: Should surface the embedding generation and scoring logic

queries.query: rules constraints match file path keywords apply
queries.description: Should surface how rules are loaded and matched to entities

queries.query: watch file changes detect modified ingest incremental
queries.description: Should surface the file watcher and incremental ingest
